body:
## Rationale

**🔴 CRITICAL: Broken relatedAlbum ref.** The live article `/articles/chaos-ad-drum-setup` references `arise-drum-setup` in its `relatedAlbums` array, but no such slug exists in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`.

**Album importance:** Sepultura's *Arise* (1991) is the bridge between *Beneath the Remains* (✅ already in DB) and *Chaos A.D.* (✅ in DB). Without it, the Sepultura discography arc has a gap at its most critical transition — the move from straight thrash into groove-metal. *Arise* charted in multiple European countries, went Gold in Brazil, and features Igor Cavalera at his most technically demanding.

**GSC/GA4 signal:** Igor Cavalera's lick pages are in the **top 2 GA4 organic pages** on the site. This article anchors his full album arc on MetalForge.

## Files to touch

- **Add to:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`
- **Create LLM companion:** `public/llms/articles/arise-drum-setup.md`

## Article data shape

```js
'arise-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'arise-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Arise',
  artist: 'Sepultura',
  drummer: 'Igor Cavalera',
  drummerId: /* Igor Cavalera's ID */,
  relatedDrummerSlug: 'igor-cavalera',
  year: 1991,
  genre: 'Thrash Metal / Death Metal',
  label: 'Roadrunner Records',
  studio: 'Studio Morumbi, São Paulo',
  producer: 'Scott Burns',
  isAlbumArticle: true,
  datePublished: '2026-06-25',
  dateModified: '2026-06-25',
  author: 'MetalForge Editorial',
  title: "Sepultura Arise Drum Setup: Igor Cavalera's 1991 Gear Breakdown",
  description: "Discover the exact drum kit and gear Igor Cavalera used to record Sepultura's Arise — the thrash masterpiece that preceded Chaos A.D. Complete 1991 setup breakdown.",
  seoKeywords: ['sepultura arise drums', 'igor cavalera drum setup', 'arise drum recording', 'igor cavalera 1991 kit'],
  intro: { title: 'The Album That Bridged Thrash and Groove Metal', content: '...' },
  drumKit: { brand: 'Tama', model: 'Tama Artstar II', /* ... */ },
  snare: { /* ... */ },
  cymbals: { brand: 'Zildjian', /* ... */ },
  faq: [ /* ≥3 Q&A */ ],
  relatedAlbums: ['beneath-the-remains-drum-setup', 'chaos-ad-drum-setup', 'roots-drum-setup'],
  relatedLicks: [{ drummerSlug: 'igor-cavalera', lickSlug: 'igor-cavalera-refuse-resist-double-bass', label: "Watch Igor Cavalera's double-bass breakdown" }],
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words in intro + drumKit description
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs
- ≥3 internal relatedAlbums links (all must exist in DB)
- LLM companion file created at `public/llms/articles/arise-drum-setup.md`

## Verify
1. `/articles/arise-drum-setup` returns 200, title includes "Arise" and "Igor Cavalera"
2. `/articles/chaos-ad-drum-setup` — related articles section renders "Arise" card without 404
3. `/llms/articles/arise-drum-setup.md` returns 200
4. Slug appears in sitemap.xml
5. JSON-LD `@type: Person` for Igor Cavalera present

## Done
[ ] `arise-drum-setup` added to `albumArticles.js` with full article data  
[ ] `public/llms/articles/arise-drum-setup.md` created  
[ ] Verified broken relatedAlbum ref in `chaos-ad-drum-setup` now resolves correctly
title: SEO: Sepultura 'Arise' drum setup article (Igor Cavalera, 1991 — fixes 🔴 broken relatedAlbum ref in live chaos-ad-drum-setup)
resolution: arise-drum-setup entry added to albumArticles.js (drummerId: 21, Tama Artstar II kit, Zildjian cymbals, Morrisound Recording, Scott Burns producer, ≥3 FAQ, relatedAlbums: ['beneath-the-remains-drum-setup','chaos-ad-drum-setup','roots-drum-setup']). LLM companion created at public/llms/articles/arise-drum-setup.md (73 lines). JS syntax validated clean. Broken relatedAlbum ref in chaos-ad-drum-setup now resolves. Implementation committed in 57aef9e.
